/usr/sbin/cc -fPIC -shared -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/link.d -Wl,-soname,libsane-brother.so.1 -o libsane-brother.so.1 "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_advini.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_bugchk.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_cmatch.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_color.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_devaccs.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_devinfo.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_log.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_mfccmd.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_misc.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_modelinf.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_netdev.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/brother_scanner.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/sane_strstatus.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/sanei_config.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/sanei_constrain_value.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother.dir/libsane-brother/sanei_init_debug.c.o" "CMakeFiles/sane-brother-stubs.dir/libsane-brother/stubs.c.o"  -ldl -lpthread -lusb /usr/lib/libusb-1.0.so /usr/lib/libjpeg.so
